case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS AIROSO, ROMEO T.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,032.20 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT AIROSO, ROMEO T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIROSO, ROMEO T.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIROSO, ROMEO T. $1,032.20 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,058.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $133.74 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT AIROSO, ROMEO T.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AIROSO, ROMEO T.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AIROSO, ROMEO T.
